arts.ttl: Leeds would be a PL club if Bamford played more - Farke
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke believes that the club would have been promoted last season if Patrick Bamford has stayed fit for longer. It comes having not started a league game so far this season, nursing injuries and struggling to get back to full fitness – as both Joseph and Piroe impress in their current roles.

arts.ttl: Sierralta starts: Watford team news and predicted XI to face Leeds United
arts.sum: The latest Watford team news as Tom Cleverley's side gear up to face Leeds United in the Championship. The post Sierralta starts: Watford team news and predicted XI to face Leeds United appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Joseph back in: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Watford
arts.sum: The latest Leeds United team news as Daniel Farke's side gear up to face Watford in the Championship. The post Joseph back in: Leeds United team news and predicted XI to face Watford appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: 2 changes: Leeds United v Watford predicted XI
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Watford this evening looking to get continue their winning form following a victory over Sheffield United on Friday. Leeds team news pre-Watford: Three out, Gnonto fit

arts.ttl: Ex-Leeds United man pens new Ipswich Town contract and offers Kalvin Phillips verdict
arts.sum: "I have loved my time at the club so far and have improved so much during my two seasons here working with this group of players and under a manager who has done so much for me," said Davis on the club’s official website. The 24 year-old-defender, who made the switch from Leeds United in 2022, has been instrumental in Ipswich's climb from League One to the Premier League under the guidance of manager Kieran McKenna.

arts.ttl: Potential Leeds United XI for Watford as Farke contemplates attacking change
arts.sum: They produced arguably their best performance of the season to date to beat promotion rivals Sheffield United last Friday so there's absolutely need for Daniel Farke to change a winning team, right? Potential United line-up vs Watford: Meslier; Bogle, Rodon, Struijk, Firpo; Rothwell, Tanaka; James, Gnonto, Ramazani; Joseph.

arts.ttl: Watford are too inconsistent at the basics says Cleverley
arts.sum: Tom Cleverley says his side will need to start doing the key things much better if they want to find some consistency.

arts.ttl: Leeds United's free agent rumours rubbished with training ground revelation
arts.sum: Space would have been an issue at Leeds United’s training ground had Daniel Farke welcomed in all of the free agents they have been linked with. The rumour mill went into overdrive after Farke publicly admitted he had hosted ‘special guests’ at Thorp Arch during the international break, having been asked about that free agent search.

arts.ttl: Leeds United squad revealed for Watford with three players ruled out amid Gnonto injury scare
arts.sum: Three points at home to Watford tonight will take Daniel Farke's team top of the Championship for the first time this season. They enter the Watford clash full of confidence and self belief, having arguably put in their best performance of the season against Sheffield United last time out.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Championship predictions including Leeds vs. Watford
